\tzpentry{ID3629}{Potential Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3629 introduces Potential Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} V(x,t) = \frac{1}{2}\bigl(\Delta\phi(t)\bigr)^2. \end{equation}
